title: Torch Jet Lighter, Butane Refillable Jet Flame, Windproof, Safe, Multi Utility for Candles, Fireplaces, Campfires, Grill (Without Butane)
features: 𝗕𝗨𝗧𝗔𝗡𝗘 𝗥𝗘𝗙𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘: Say goodbye to disposable lighters. This powerful torch lighter is 100% refillable with butane gas (not included), making it an eco-friendly and cost-effective choice. Built with a durable clear fuel tank, you can easily monitor gas levels for convenient refills.

𝗪𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗙 𝗙𝗟𝗔𝗠𝗘: Engineered with windproof technology, the strong blue flame stays lit even in tough outdoor conditions. Whether you’re camping, hiking, grilling, lighting candles, fireworks, or cigars, this lighter delivers reliable performance every time.

𝗔𝗗𝗝𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗙𝗟𝗔𝗠𝗘 𝗦𝗜𝗭𝗘: Customise your flame with the built-in flame size regulator, giving you full control. From precise low flames for kitchen use, baking, crème brûlée, and DIY crafts, to powerful high flames for outdoor fire-starting, this lighter adapts to every need.

𝗦𝗔𝗙𝗘𝗧𝗬 𝗟𝗢𝗖𝗞 & 𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘: Designed with a safety lock button to prevent accidental ignition, keeping you and your family safe. Its lightweight and compact design makes it easy to carry in your pocket, backpack, or tool kit, making it ideal for both home and travel use.

𝗠𝗨𝗟𝗧𝗜𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗣𝗢𝗦𝗘 𝗟𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗘𝗥: With a sleek, modern design and ergonomic grip, this lighter looks as good as it performs. Perfect for culinary chefs, cigar lovers, campers, BBQ enthusiasts, and DIY hobbyists, it combines style, safety, and performance in one versatile tool.
